The Approach

Where you are
is exactly
where we start.

Connected Horsemanship meets you and your horse exactly where you are on your journey — no judgement, no rigid program, no one-size-fits-all method.

Amber combines Natural Horsemanship principles with years of hands-on experience across disciplines — from ground work and liberty to trail riding, cow work, and competitive events.

Every session is built around your specific goals, your horse's personality, and the relationship you want to build together.

CHA
Certified Instructor
15+
Years experience
All
Disciplines welcome
1:1
Private sessions

What's Offered

Training that fits
your actual life.

Whether you're a first-time horse owner or a seasoned rider working through a specific challenge — there's a place for you here.

01

Handling & Management

Make your everyday with horses smoother, more efficient, and more rewarding. Address herd dynamics, feeding aggression, inconsistency, and structure.

  • Herd dynamics & feeding aggression
  • Day-to-day handling routines
  • Structure and consistency
  • Tailored to your specific needs
02

Ground Skills + Liberty

Build real rapport and two-way communication. Progress your relationship and riding to the next level with effective, kind tools.

  • Rapport & two-way communication
  • Maintain gait & direction without micromanaging
  • Softness in face & body
  • Drive and draw, on-line and at Liberty
  • Smooth transitions & fluid direction changes
  • Ground tie for grooming & saddling
03

Riding with Connection

Put your ground skills into practice under saddle. Achieve real cooperation, consistency and softness using energy and aids — not just hands.

  • Pre-mount check in
  • Refined seat, hands, legs & energy
  • Turns, side passing, straight backing
  • Soft transitions & loose rein gait
  • Engaging hind end stop
04

Problem Solving

Need short-term focused work on a specific issue? Reach out for an evaluation and let's put together a targeted plan.

  • Specific behavior challenges
  • Custom evaluation session
  • Short-term targeted lessons
05

Trail & Travel Prep

Safely build a confident, focused trail partner. From obstacles to trailer loading — be ready for anything out on the trail.

  • Keeping focus on you on trail
  • Obstacle confidence building
  • Emergency stop & de-escalation
  • Barn/buddy sour behavior
  • Trailer loading & trailering safety
  • Hauling — hook up, driving, backing

Ready to start?

"Connection is key."

The Philosophy

No matter the discipline —
there's always room for
Connected Horsemanship.

Amber's approach has evolved over the years into less-invasive techniques that consider the whole horse — drawing from Natural Horsemanship, LIMA principles, Attunement, and biomechanics.

Whether your goal is a calm trail partner, a responsive liberty horse, or a competitive show horse — the foundation is always the same: real connection, real communication, real results.

Book Your First Session

About Amber

A lifetime of
learning alongside horses.

Amber's love for horses was immediate — indulged by her grandparents at a young age. She spent her early years as a DIY horse owner and dedicated apprentice to a dirt-road breeding operation, riding and caring for half-feral horses that no magazine could have prepared her for.

She continued through adolescence learning old-school methods and significantly through trial and error — before being introduced to Natural Horsemanship as a young adult. That introduction changed everything.

She began helping rehab OTTBs for rehoming through a non-profit, which led to forming and facilitating a large trail riding and event group as a Trail Coach. From there she became a Certified Riding Instructor with CHA, giving one-on-one arena and trail lessons, trail rides, facilitating Youth Horse Camps, and much more.

Her methods have continued to evolve — into less-invasive, whole-horse techniques drawing from LIMA, Attunement, biomechanics, liberty work clinics, obstacle courses, ranch work, and Stock Horse shows. She is committed to continuing her education through many avenues, always.
